query:
SELECT 'tenants' as tbl, id, company_name FROM tenants WHERE id >= 90003 AND id <= 90005
UNION ALL
SELECT 'customers', id, COALESCE(company, contact_name) FROM customers WHERE id >= 120001 AND id <= 120003
UNION ALL
SELECT 'technicians', id, CAST(tenant_id AS TEXT) FROM technicians WHERE id >= 30001 AND id <= 30003
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tasks', id, CAST(tenant_id AS TEXT) FROM tasks WHERE id >= 30001 AND id <= 30003
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tenant_users', id, email FROM tenant_users WHERE id >= 120001 AND id <= 120010;
